_comment: graph-cli reads this with `graph build/deploy --network <key>` and rewrites subgraph.yaml's source.address + source.startBlock + dataSource.network per target. The top-level keys are Graph-Node network NAMES (not chainIds). 'robinhood' (chainId 46630) and 'local' (anvil 31337) are custom networks that require a self-hosted Graph Node configured for those RPCs — Studio's hosted indexers do not serve them. Replace the 0x0 placeholders + startBlock with the real deployment values from deployments/<chainId>.json once deployed (registry/distributor addresses) and the block the contracts were deployed at.
